notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jorbit Vivas reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Blaze Alexander. Jorbit Vivas to 2nd. Jorbit Vivas advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Blaze Alexander.

notableEvents.label: Samuel Basallo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo singles on a ground ball to right fielder Dylan Crews. Pete Alonso scores.

notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson grounds into a force out, shortstop CJ Abrams to second baseman Nasim Nuñez. Blaze Alexander out at 2nd. Jeremiah Jackson advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Nasim Nuñez.
